headline: Morgan Stanley Lifts Aflac (AFL) PT to $125 on Solid Insurance Trends
summary: Aflac Incorporated (NYSE:AFL) is included among the Dividend Stock Portfolio For Retirement: Top 12 Stock Picks. On May 21, Morgan Stanley analyst Bob Huang raised the firm’s price target on Aflac Incorporated (NYSE:AFL) to $125 from $120 and maintained an Equal Weight rating on the stock. The analyst said results for life insurance companies were […]

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Aflac, Raises Price Target to $130
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Paul Newsome   maintains Aflac (NYSE:AFL) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $125 to $130.
